# load raw text
with open('/mnt/data/file-J3PRmqw4vE1CaTwce73nqf-text_to_analyse.txt','r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    raw = f.read()
raw[:200]

import re

starts = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(r'\(aya_start\)', raw)]
ends = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(r'\(aya_end\)', raw)]
len(starts), len(ends), starts, ends

trim_chars = set(' \n\t\r\'"«»()[]{}<>،؛:.,!?…ـ')
aya_spans = []
for s,e in zip(starts,ends):
    start = s + len('(aya_start)')
    end = e
    span = raw[start:end]
    # trim edges
    # trim leading
    while span and span[0] in trim_chars:
        span = span[1:]
    while span and span[-1] in trim_chars:
        span = span[:-1]
    # verify find
    idx = raw.find(span)
    if idx==-1:
        print("not found",span)
    aya_spans.append((idx, idx+len(span), span))

aya_spans

hadith_phrase = 'إنما بعثت معلما'
occurs = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(hadith_phrase, raw)]
occurs

hadith_spans = []
for idx in occurs:
    start = idx
    end = idx + len(hadith_phrase)
    # ensure raw matches
    assert raw[start:end] == hadith_phrase
    hadith_spans.append((start,end,hadith_phrase))
hadith_spans

s1 = 'وَقالَ الَّذِي آمَنَ يا قَوْمِ اتَّبِعُونِ أَهْدِكُمْ سَبِيلَ الرَّشادِ* يا قَوْمِ إِنَّما هذِهِ الْحَياةُ الدُّنْيا مَتاعٌ وَإِنَّ الْآخِرَةَ هِيَ دارُ الْقَرَارِ'
i1 = raw.find(s1)
i1

# find "كقوله تعالى:"
pos = raw.find('كقوله تعالى')
pos

prefix = 'كقوله تعالى: '
start1 = raw.find(prefix)+len(prefix)
# Now take until ' غافر'
end1 = raw.find(' غافر', start1)
span1 = raw[start1:end1]
# trim
span=span1
while span and span[0] in trim_chars: span=span[1:]
while span and span[-1] in trim_chars: span=span[:-1]
span, start1, start1+len(span)

prefix2 = 'كقوله تعالى '
start2 = raw.find(prefix2, pos2) + len(prefix2)
end2 = raw.find(' يوسف', start2)
span2=raw[start2:end2]
# trim
span=span2
while span and span[0] in trim_chars: span=span[1:]
while span and span[-1] in trim_chars: span=span[:-1]
span, start2, start2+len(span)

prefix3 = 'كقوله تعالى '
start3 = raw.find(prefix3, pos3) + len(prefix3)
# until ' النحل:'
end3 = raw.find(' النحل:', start3)
span3 = raw[start3:end3]
# trim
span = span3
while span and span[0] in trim_chars: span=span[1:]
while span and span[-1] in trim_chars: span=span[:-1]
span, start3, start3+len(span)

prefix4 = 'كما في قوله تعالى '
start4 = raw.find(prefix4, pos4) + len(prefix4)
# until ' الواقعة'
end4 = raw.find(' الواقعة', start4)
span4 = raw[start4:end4]
# trim
span = span4
while span and span[0] in trim_chars: span=span[1:]
while span and span[-1] in trim_chars: span=span[:-1]
span, start4, start4+len(span)

# assemble
citations = []
for st,en,sp in aya_spans:
    citations.append((st,en,sp,'Aya'))
for st,en,sp in hadith_spans:
    citations.append((st,en,sp,'Hadeeth'))
# reference ayas
refs = [(1763,1925,'وَقالَ الَّذِي آمَنَ يا قَوْمِ اتَّبِعُونِ أَهْدِكُمْ سَبِيلَ الرَّشادِ* يا قَوْمِ إِنَّما هذِهِ الْحَياةُ الدُّنْيا مَتاعٌ وَإِنَّ الْآخِرَةَ هِيَ دارُ الْقَرَارِ'),
        (1998,2098,'يا أَبَتِ إِنِّي رَأَيْتُ أَحَدَ عَشَرَ كَوْكَباً وَالشَّمْسَ وَالْقَمَرَ رَأَيْتُهُمْ لِي ساجِدِينَ'),
        (2314,2380,'وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِلَّهِ الْبَناتِ سُبْحَانَهُ وَلَهُمْ ما يَشْتَهُونَ'),
        (2420,2500,'فَلا أُقْسِمُ بِمَواقِعِ النُّجُومِ* وَإِنَّهُ لَقَسَمٌ لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عَظِيمٌ')]
for st,en,sp in refs:
    citations.append((st,en,sp,'Aya'))
# sort
citations_sorted = sorted(citations, key=lambda x: x[0])
# prepare output
output = []
for st,en,sp,ty in citations_sorted:
    output.append({"span_start":st, "span_end":en, "span_text":sp, "citation_type":ty})
import json
print(json.dumps({"citations":output}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":278,"span_end":396,"span_text":"وَقُلْ إِنِّي نَذِرٌ لِّرَبِّي وَلَا أَقُولُ لِلَّذِينَ تَجْهَرُ بِالْعَمَلِ السَّيِّئَاتِ مَا تَفْعَلُونَ مِنْ شَيْءٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":458,"span_end":473,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":627,"span_end":791,"span_text":"وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ * فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ السَّاجِدِينَ * وَاعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأْتِيَكَ الْيَقِينُ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":852,"span_end":867,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1017,"span_end":1070,"span_text":"وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ الذِّكْرَىٰ تَنْفَعُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1131,"span_end":1146,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1298,"span_end":1450,"span_text":"وَلَا تَسْتَوِي الْحَسَنَةُ وَلَا السَّيِّئَةُ ۚ ادْفَعْ بِالَّتِي هِيَ أَحْسَنُ فَإِذَا الَّذِي بَيْنَكَ وَبَيْنَهُ عَدَاوَةٌ كَأَنَّهُ وَلِيٌّ حَمِيمٌ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1507,"span_end":1522,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1763,"span_end":1925,"span_text":"وَقالَ الَّذِي آمَنَ يا قَوْمِ اتَّبِعُونِ أَهْدِكُمْ سَبِيلَ الرَّشادِ* يا قَوْمِ إِنَّما هذِهِ الْحَياةُ الدُّنْيا مَتاعٌ وَإِنَّ الْآخِرَةَ هِيَ دارُ الْقَرَارِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1998,"span_end":2098,"span_text":"يا أَبَتِ إِنِّي رَأَيْتُ أَحَدَ عَشَرَ كَوْكَباً وَالشَّمْسَ وَالْقَمَرَ رَأَيْتُهُمْ لِي ساجِدِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":2314,"span_end":2380,"span_text":"وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِلَّهِ الْبَناتِ سُبْحَانَهُ وَلَهُمْ ما يَشْتَهُونَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":2420,"span_end":2500,"span_text":"فَلا أُقْسِمُ بِمَواقِعِ النُّجُومِ* وَإِنَّهُ لَقَسَمٌ لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عَظِيمٌ","citation_type":"Aya"}]}
